posts.text: #epsteinfiles #pambondi Attorney General Pam Bondi’s “briefing” for House members on the Epstein files quickly goes off the rails. They say Bondi  won’t commit to testifying under oath as required by her subpoena

posts.text: #traveltok #ice #tsa TSA lines are getting longer and longer at airports around the country and hundreds of TSA agents have quit because they have now gone more than a month without pay. And that’s because Congress has not funded homeland security. The White House presented its latest offer and Democrats threw it out. This video explains what it’s going to take to end this funding standoff

posts.text: #presidenttrump #nato #straitofhormuz President Trump asked for help with reopening the Strait of Hormuz from the NATO allies. Abruptly today, Trump said we don’t need help from anyone. So what happened? Turns out the NATO allies turned down his request. Here’s why.
